segments.speaker: Server
segments.text: Hi, what can I get for you?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Could I get the rice bowl, please?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Tofu, please. Does the sauce have nuts in it?

segments.speaker: Server
segments.text: No nuts, but it does have sesame.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Sesame is fine. Could I get the sauce on the side?

segments.speaker: Student
segments.text: Thanks. Are you in the architecture program?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yeah, first week. I'm still figuring out the food situation and everything else.

segments.speaker: Student
segments.text: This place is decent when you're in a hurry.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Good to know. I need a few reliable options.
